calls.title: Medical Case Register & Fleet Management
calls.summary: Call clarified fleet management and medical case register module applicability for the Alrayan and Moonflower entities within the Modon project. Fleet management is not applicable for Alrayan (no vehicles); Moonflower will confirm by Monday whether 8-10 internal golf cars should be onboarded. Medical case register was agreed to be integrated into existing HSE incident management for both CWRC and Moonflower rather than as a standalone module.
key_points: Fleet management module not applicable for Alrayan entity (no vehicles)
Moonflower has 8-10 internal golf cars — fleet management applicability to be confirmed by Monday
Medical case register integrated into existing HSE incident management for CWRC and Moonflower
Moonflower to share occupational and non-occupational first aid templates for configuration
decisions: Fleet management NOT proceeding for Alrayan at this time
Medical case logging to be integrated into existing HSE incident flows
Moonflower golf car fleet management to be confirmed by Monday

action_items.task: Confirm fleet management requirement for golf cars with management
Share occupational and non-occupational first aid report templates

risks: Moonflower golf car fleet management confirmation still pending — minor scope uncertainty

Ammar expressed frustration at imprecise data requests causing internal back-and-forth; improved communication protocols agreed. crm_account_name empty in Clari — mapped to modon-phase-3 based on CWRC being a Modon entity.

Statutory compliance lists and work permit checklists already shared by Ammar
Project H&S plan deprioritized
Man-hours/closures form clarified as separate module
Ammar expressed frustration at imprecise data requests causing internal confusion

Facilio to provide existing templates to avoid duplication
